title: Backend Engineer
job_description: We are hiring a backend engineer to build internal APIs and data workflows. You will work closely with product and infrastructure teams. Strong Python experience is required. Experience with PostgreSQL and REST APIs is important. Familiarity with Docker is a plus. We offer a fully remote setup and async collaboration across European time zones.

metadata_text.location: Remote within Europe; Candidates must be based in Europe; Work hours should overlap with CET by at least 4 hours
metadata_text.work_auth: Applicants must already have the legal right to work in their country of residence
